title: Orange Cap in IPL 2026: Abhishek Sharma plays cat and mouse with Heinrich Klaasen for top spot in list of most runs
content:
The race for the IPL 2026 Orange Cap (most runs) is exceptionally close.
*   Abhishek Sharma and Heinrich Klaasen are the primary contenders for the top spot.
*   They are currently engaged in a dynamic "cat and mouse" battle, constantly exchanging the lead for most runs.

title: SEBI panel asks NSE to pay ₹1,800 crore to settle cases: report
content:
A SEBI panel has reportedly recommended that the National Stock Exchange (NSE) make a payment.
*   The suggested amount for this payment is ₹1,800 crore.
*   This proposed payment is intended to settle various pending cases against the exchange.

title: Guns good at close range? Disturbing prompts asked on ChatGPT before Florida university shooting
content:
Disturbing prompts, including the question "Guns good at close range?", were submitted.
*   These inquiries were made using the AI chatbot ChatGPT.
*   The prompts were discovered to have occurred prior to a shooting at a Florida university.

title: Supreme Court agrees to hear plea challenging validity of National Investigation Agency Act, 2008
content:
The Supreme Court has agreed to hear a petition.
*   This petition challenges the constitutional validity of a specific law.
*   The law in question is the National Investigation Agency (NIA) Act, enacted in 2008.

title: Can we expect a believer to follow any age-old practice in the modern era, asks Supreme Court
content:
The Supreme Court is questioning whether it's reasonable for followers of a faith to continue ancient religious practices in the modern era.
*   The query highlights the ongoing tension between traditional customs and contemporary societal norms.
*   It suggests a potential re-evaluation of the relevance and practical application of long-standing religious customs in today's world.
